headline: A Look At Sysco (SYY) Valuation As Cash Flow Strain And Returns On Capital Raise Concerns
summary: Why concerns about Sysco (SYY) are back on investors’ radar Investor attention on Sysco (SYY) has picked up after commentary flagged its 2.4% free cash flow margin and weakening returns on capital, raising fresh questions about whether recent investments are benefiting shareholders. See our latest analysis for Sysco. At a share price of US$76.29, Sysco has seen a 5.3% 30 day share price gain but a roughly 10% decline over 90 days, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 5.4% points to...
